title: The Delhi High Court Act, 1966
full_text: The Delhi High Court Act, 1966 दिल्‍ली उच्‍च न्‍यायालय अधिनियम, 1966 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 196626 Act Number: 26 Enactment Date: 1966-09-05 Act Year: 1966 Short Title: The Delhi High Court Act, 1966 Hindi Title: दिल्‍ली उच्‍च न्‍यायालय अधिनियम, 1966 Long Title: An Act to provide for the constitution of a High Court for the Union territory of Delhi, for the extension of the jurisdiction of that High Court to the Union territory of Himachal Pradesh and for matters connected therewith. Ministry: Ministry of Law and Justice Department: Department of Justice Enforcement Date: 01-05-1967 Notification: 1st May, 1967, vide notification No. G.S.R. 508 (E), dated 11th April, 1967, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3 (i). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Delhi High Court Act, 1966 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Show Related Subordinates Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. High Court. Section 3A. Salaries and allowances or Judges to be expenditure charged on Consolidated Fund of India. Section 4. Exceptions and modifications subject to which the provisions of Chapter V of Part VI of the Constitution apply to the High Court of Delhi. Section 5. Jurisdiction of High Court of Delhi. Section 6. Power to enrol legal practitioners, etc. Section 7. Practice and procedure in the High Court of Delhi. Show Related Subordinates Section 8. Custody of the Seal of the High Court of Delhi. Section 9. Form of writs and other processes. Section 10. Powers of Judges. Section 11. Procedure as to appeals to Supreme Court. Section 12. Transfer of proceedings from the High Court of Punjab to the High Court of Delhi. Section 13. Right to appear or to act in proceedings transferred to the High Court of Delhi. Section 14. Interpretation. Section 15. Savings. Section 16. Pending proceedings before subordinate courts in Delhi. Section 17. Extension of the jurisdiction of the High Court of Delhi. Section 18. Rule of construction. Section 19. Repealed. Section 20. Power to remove difficulties. Section 21. Power to adapt laws. Schedule 1.
